[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A stylized anime-style portrait shows a young person with short dark hair looking forward under soft, warm lighting.

Main Subject:
The main subject is a single anime-style person shown from the upper chest up, facing the viewer with their head slightly tilted. They have short, layered dark hair with bangs and a few strands framing the face. Their eyes are large and stylized, with dark upper outlines and reddish-pink irises, and their expression is calm with a small, closed-mouth smile. They wear a light-colored, open-collared top with a darker inner layer, with visible layered fabric at the neck and chest.

Setting:
The background appears blurred and indistinct, with muted gray and tan tones. A circular or rounded light-colored shape is partially visible behind the head on the left side, but the overall scene details are unclear.

Visual Details:
The lighting is soft and warm, casting gentle shadows across the face and hair. The color palette is dominated by grays and dark browns in the hair, pale skin tones, and light blue-gray and white clothing. The camera angle is straight-on and close-cropped, focusing attention on the face and upper torso.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image is a close-up, anime-style portrait of a person with short dark hair and reddish-pink eyes. They are wearing a light open-collared outfit and are set against a blurred, neutral background.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text found in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- **Text:** None detected (image appears to be an illustration/character with no visible UI, captions, or typography).

# Notes

- There is no clearly legible text in the provided screenshot.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, medium shot portrait of Osamu Dazai from Bungo Stray Dogs, an anime character. He has messy, dark brown hair that frames his face and falls over his forehead. His eyes are a striking crimson red, with a slight smirk playing on his lips, giving him a somewhat enigmatic and playful expression. He is wearing a light tan suit jacket over a white collared shirt and a white cravat or scarf tied around his neck. The background is dimly lit, with a subtle shadow cast on the right side of his face. A blurred clock face with Roman numerals is visible in the upper left corner, suggesting an indoor setting, possibly an office or room. The lighting is soft and atmospheric, with a warm, slightly desaturated color palette dominated by browns, tans, and muted reds, creating a moody and introspective atmosphere. The art style is characteristic of anime, with clean lines and expressive facial features.
